expectations.text: Report identifies 185.220.101.45 as the beacon destination
expectations.evidence: predicate 'identifies_beacon_dest_ip' returned True on 7593 chars of output

expectations.text: Report identifies the suspicious domain c2-check.examplebad.xyz
expectations.evidence: predicate 'identifies_beacon_domain' returned True on 7593 chars of output
predicate 'identifies_beacon_interval' returned True on 7593 chars of output

expectations.text: Report includes an IOC table / list with the malicious IP and domain
expectations.evidence: predicate 'includes_ioc_section' returned True on 7593 chars of output

expectations.text: Report does NOT label 93.184.216.34 (example.com) as malicious / C2 at the same severity as the real beacon dest
expectations.evidence: predicate 'does_not_falsely_flag_example_ip' returned False on 7593 chars of output

expectations.text: Output has a headed structure with TL;DR or executive summary plus findings
expectations.evidence: predicate 'report_has_structure' returned True on 7593 chars of output

expectations.text: Report cites specific frame numbers as evidence
expectations.evidence: predicate 'cites_frame_numbers' returned False on 7593 chars of output
